meta.designer_notes: A gritty dark fantasy economy where gold is tight, heroes are expendable, and every expedition risks corruption. Three resources form the core: gold (flow currency), iron ore (early bottleneck), and shadow essence (late-game premium). Five combat classes cover tank, damage, support, bruiser, and speed archetypes. Three buildings form the production core: Guildhall (gold), Forge (gear), Shadow Vault (essence). Two acts progress from the corrupted outskirts to the undercity depths.

nodes.label: Gold
nodes.description: Guild coin — earned from contracts and expeditions, spent on every building, recruit, and upgrade in this tight economy.

nodes.label: Shadow Essence
nodes.description: Crystallized corruption harvested from shadow creatures — used to craft cursed gear and power dark rituals.

nodes.label: Iron Ore
nodes.description: Raw ore from the northern mines — the foundation of all standard equipment and the Act 1 crafting bottleneck.

nodes.label: Shieldbearer
nodes.description: Frontline guardian — highest DEF and HP on the roster with a survival passive that hardens when wounded, making them nearly unkillable but slow to clear expeditions.

unique_passive.description: DEF ×1.8 when HP drops below 30% — the shield refuses to fall.

nodes.label: Shadow Hunter
nodes.description: Swift assassin — highest ATK on the roster with a wipe-risk passive that doubles damage when the party is near death, tempting players to run riskier expeditions.

unique_passive.description: ATK ×1.5 when party HP is critically low — the fury of the doomed.

nodes.label: Warden
nodes.description: Occult scout — balanced stats with highest LCK for better loot, rewarding patient play with superior spoils but never leading the damage charts.

unique_passive.description: LCK ×2.0 on DOMINANT expedition results — the dark favors the prepared.

nodes.label: Plague Veteran
nodes.description: Scarred survivor — highest HP pool enables aggressive expedition selection, with a passive that grants bonus HP in high-level zones where others would falter.

unique_passive.description: HP +80 when expedition level >= 8 — old scars harden against greater threats.

nodes.label: Outrunner
nodes.description: Desperate scout — highest SPD minimizes expedition duration, with a passive that accelerates further on speed clears but contributes little to DPS checks.

unique_passive.description: SPD ×1.3 when expedition completes under 60s — flight over fight.

nodes.label: Forgemaster
nodes.description: Master smith — specializes in weapons and armor crafting at the Forge; consecutive same-recipe jobs build streak bonuses that significantly reduce craft time.

unique_passive.description: Workflow speed ×1.2 when streak count >= 3 — rhythm of the hammer.

nodes.label: Shadow Alchemist
nodes.description: Essence distiller — specializes in shadow extraction and cursed crafting at the Shadow Vault; consecutive extractions build streak bonuses that increase crit chance and purity.

unique_passive.description: Crit chance +0.15 when streak count >= 4 — refined extraction.

nodes.label: Contract Broker
nodes.description: Gold negotiator — manages contracts at the Guildhall; continuous contract processing builds momentum that compounds gold income from all sources.

unique_passive.description: Gold income ×1.15 when momentum >= 50 — deals compound over time.

nodes.label: Guildhall
nodes.description: The guild's public face where contracts are signed — produces gold passively and hosts contract negotiation workflows.

nodes.label: Forge
nodes.description: A soot-choked workshop where iron ore is melted down and hammered into weapons and armor — the backbone of equipment production.

nodes.label: Shadow Vault
nodes.description: A hidden chamber that distills shadow essence from captured corruption — unlocks in Act 2 and feeds the cursed economy.

nodes.label: Act 1: The Outskirts
nodes.description: The city's walls no longer hold back the plague-tainted wilds. The guild takes its first contracts into the ruined outskirts, where bandits and shadow beasts pick at the weak.
nodes.narrative_log: The outskirts are secured, but the shadow grows deeper. The guild has proven itself capable — now it must prove itself willing to face what lies beneath.

nodes.label: Outskirts Road
nodes.description: The old trade road beyond the city gates — now patrolled by shadow wisps and desperate scavengers.

nodes.label: Bandit Hideout
nodes.description: A collapsed merchant camp turned fortress — bandits prey on anyone crossing the old trade roads.

nodes.label: Wolf Den
nodes.description: A shadow-touched wolf pack's lair — hidden in a collapsed barrow. Dangerous but rich in spoils.

nodes.label: The Shadow Hound
nodes.description: A massive corrupted beast — the alpha of the shadow-touched wolf packs. Its plague-scarred hide gleams in the dim light.

phases.label: Hunting Stance
phases.log_message: The Shadow Hound circles, jaws dripping with corrupted saliva...

phases.label: Pack Caller
phases.log_message: Wounded, the Shadow Hound howls — its pack answers!

nodes.label: Act 2: The Undercity
nodes.description: Below the city lie drowned districts, abandoned vaults, and the whispers of a dead library. The guild descends to sever the plague's source.
nodes.narrative_log: The Pale Archivist falls, and with it, the plague's grip loosens. But the undercity holds more secrets than one lich's vault...

nodes.label: Flooded Sewers
nodes.description: The water is black with rot and things that move under it. The sewers connect to every corner of the undercity.

nodes.label: Abandoned District
nodes.description: The streets are empty except for husks and whispering windows. Something drove the residents out — or worse.

nodes.label: Cult Catacombs
nodes.description: The cult keeps the undercity fed on fear and sacrifice. Their catacombs hold the path to the Pale Archivist.

nodes.label: The Pale Archivist
nodes.description: A lich who knows too much — keeper of forbidden lore, master of the plague's secrets. Death is a door they hold the key to.

phases.label: Ancient Knowledge
phases.log_message: The Pale Archivist's eyes glow with ancient knowledge...

phases.label: Forbidden Words
phases.log_message: Forbidden words twist the air — corruption spreads!

phases.label: Death's Door
phases.log_message: The Archivist opens death's door — an enrage timer begins!

nodes.label: Roadside Ambush
nodes.description: Shadow wisps dart between the wreckage of old carts. Something moves in the mist ahead.
nodes.log_message: The road ahead is blocked by wreckage. Do you press through or find another path?

outcome.log_message: You burst through the ambush — scars earned, but the road is clear.
A longer path, but safer. You lose time but avoid the ambush.

nodes.label: Bandit Campfire
nodes.description: A bandit campfire burns low. They're drunk on stolen wine — vulnerable, but dangerous if startled.
nodes.log_message: The bandits haven't noticed you yet. What do you do?

outcome.log_message: The bandits fall before they can sober up. Their loot is yours.
You take what you can carry and slip away before they notice.
The bandits reveal information about the Shadow Hound's lair.

nodes.label: The Wolf's Gaze
nodes.description: The alpha wolf watches from the shadows of the barrow. Its eyes glow with unnatural shadow.
nodes.log_message: The wolf pack surrounds you. The alpha waits for your move.

outcome.log_message: The alpha falls quickly — the pack scatters without its leader.
You scatter the wolves but the alpha escapes. Less loot, less danger.

nodes.label: Rising Sludge
nodes.description: The sewer water rises — something foul churns beneath the surface.
nodes.log_message: The sludge begins to move. Shapes form within it.

outcome.log_message: You battle through the sludge creatures — foul work, but thorough.
You climb through the rafters, avoiding the sludge entirely.

nodes.label: Whispering Windows
nodes.description: The abandoned buildings whisper with voices that aren't there. A ghost watches from a shattered window.
nodes.log_message: The ghost points toward the district center — or is it warning you away?

outcome.log_message: The ghost leads you to a hidden cache of valuables.
You ignore the spirit and forge ahead. The whispering fades.

nodes.label: Cultist Ritual
nodes.description: Cultists chant around a shadowy altar. They're summoning something — or binding it.
nodes.log_message: The cultists haven't noticed you. The ritual pulses with dark energy.

outcome.log_message: The ritual explodes in a burst of shadow — dangerous, but the cultists are scattered.
You learn the cult's secrets without risking confrontation.
You infiltrate the cult — if your luck holds, you'll walk away with their treasures.

nodes.label: Iron Dagger
nodes.description: A crude blade forged from northern iron — reliable but unremarkable.

nodes.label: Worn Blade
nodes.description: A battered sword that has seen too many fights — still sharp enough.

nodes.label: Iron Sword
nodes.description: Standard issue blade for the outskirts — dependable iron that holds an edge.

nodes.label: Iron Axe
nodes.description: A heavy axe favored by mercenaries — brutal in close quarters.

nodes.label: Shadow Hunter's Blade
nodes.description: A swift blade tempered in shadow essence — favored by assassins who strike from the dark.

nodes.label: Veteran's Spear
nodes.description: A spear carried by a plague veteran — stained with the blood of countless beasts.

nodes.label: Plague-Scarred Greatsword
nodes.description: A massive blade corroded by plague residue — still devastating in the right hands.

nodes.label: Void Reaver
nodes.description: A legendary blade forged from void metal — hungers for shadow.

nodes.label: Leather Vest
nodes.description: Basic leather protection — better than nothing against claws and blades.

nodes.label: Scout's Tunic
nodes.description: Light armor favored by outrunners — allows quick movement.

nodes.label: Iron Chestplate
nodes.description: Heavy plate forged from northern iron — solid protection for frontline fighters.

nodes.label: Mercenary Mail
nodes.description: Chainmail worn by countless sellswords — each ring tells a story.

nodes.label: Shadow-Woven Cloak
nodes.description: A cloak woven with shadow essence — blurs the wearer's outline.

nodes.label: Veteran's Plate
nodes.description: Battle-scarred plate armor — worn by survivors of the deepest corruption.

nodes.label: Plague-Mail of the Fallen
nodes.description: Armor hardened by plague residue — those who wear it are marked by the darkness.

nodes.label: Leather Belt
nodes.description: A simple belt with pouches for supplies — keeps essentials close.

nodes.label: Iron Ring
nodes.description: A plain iron band — rumored to bring minor fortune.

nodes.label: Scout's Boots
nodes.description: Worn leather boots — quiet on stone and steel alike.

nodes.label: Hunter's Cloak
nodes.description: A cloak that masks the wearer's scent — useful against shadow beasts.

nodes.label: Warden's Sigil
nodes.description: An occult pendant worn by Wardens — whispers of fortune in the dark.

nodes.label: Shadow Amulet
nodes.description: A charm that helps the guild read the dark — glows faintly near corruption.

nodes.label: Cursed Charm of the Deep
nodes.description: A charm pulled from the undercity's depths — fortune comes at a price.

nodes.label: Shadow-Touched Relic Fragment
nodes.description: A shard of something ancient — pulses with faint corruption.

nodes.label: Void Relic
nodes.description: A unique boss relic pulled from the undercity's deepest vault — radiates power.

nodes.label: Heart of the Shadow Hound
nodes.description: The corrupted heart of the alpha beast — still beats with dark power.

nodes.label: Health Potion
nodes.description: A basic restorative — stops bleeding and closes minor wounds.

nodes.label: Ration Pack
nodes.description: Dried meat and hardtack — keeps morale up on long expeditions.

nodes.label: Shadow Essence Vial
nodes.description: Distilled shadow essence — grants heightened senses at a cost.

nodes.label: Courage Draught
nodes.description: A bitter brew that steadies the nerves — essential for undercity delves.

nodes.label: Cursed Elixir
nodes.description: An elixir brewed with shadow essence — power flows through those who dare drink.

nodes.label: Warden's Tonic
nodes.description: A tonic blessed by Wardens — fortune favors those who drink before departure.

nodes.label: Shadowblood Infusion
nodes.description: An infusion of pure shadowblood — transforms the drinker temporarily.

nodes.label: Iron Ore
nodes.description: Raw ore from the northern mines — the foundation of all standard equipment.

nodes.label: Crude Herb
nodes.description: Common herbs gathered from the outskirts — used in basic potions.

nodes.label: Wolf Pelt
nodes.description: A shadow-touched wolf's hide — tough and slightly corrupted.

nodes.label: Refined Iron
nodes.description: Iron smelted at the Forge — pure and ready for crafting.

nodes.label: Shadow Herb
nodes.description: Herbs that grow only in corrupted soil — potent but dangerous.

nodes.label: Shadow Essence Crystal
nodes.description: Crystallized shadow essence — the purest form of corrupted power.

nodes.label: Hound Fang
nodes.description: A fang from a shadow hound — still drips with corruption.

nodes.label: Bandit Mask
nodes.description: A crude mask worn by bandits — offers minimal protection.

nodes.label: Gold Purse
nodes.description: A purse of coins looted from bandits — always welcome.

nodes.label: Rusted Dagger
nodes.description: A corroded blade from the sewers — salvageable but barely.

nodes.label: Sewer Herb
nodes.description: Fungi that grow in the flooded sewers — alchemically useful.

nodes.label: Moldy Scroll
nodes.description: A water-damaged scroll from the undercity — text barely legible.

nodes.label: Ghost Charm
nodes.description: A trinket left behind by the dead — faintly haunted.

nodes.label: Cultist Robe
nodes.description: Robes worn by cultists — stained with ritual residue.

nodes.label: Occult Charm
nodes.description: A charm used in dark rituals — pulses with residual power.

nodes.label: Forbidden Tome
nodes.description: A book of forbidden knowledge — best left unread.

nodes.label: Archivist's Key
nodes.description: A key that opens the Pale Archivist's vault — glows with necromantic energy.

nodes.label: Lich Phylactery Shard
nodes.description: A shard of the Pale Archivist's phylactery — contains a fragment of their power.

nodes.label: Contract Network
nodes.description: Expanded contract negotiations bring in more gold from each expedition.

nodes.label: Guild Coffers
nodes.description: Reinforced vaults allow the guild to store more gold before hitting capacity.

nodes.label: Merchant Alliance
nodes.description: Formal trade agreements with northern merchants increase gold income significantly.

nodes.label: Veteran Training
nodes.description: Seasoned veterans teach combat techniques to new recruits.

nodes.label: Iron Will
nodes.description: Mental conditioning helps heroes resist the corrupting influence of the shadow.

nodes.label: Swift Reflexes
nodes.description: Agility training helps heroes dodge shadow beast attacks.

nodes.label: Efficient Smelting
nodes.description: Improved forge techniques reduce the time needed to smelt ore and craft weapons.

nodes.label: Master Crafting
nodes.description: Master smiths share advanced techniques for working with shadow-touched materials.

nodes.label: Scout's Wisdom
nodes.description: Veteran scouts share knowledge of shadow beast tactics and weak points.

nodes.label: Plunder
nodes.description: Training in looting techniques helps heroes recover more from defeated enemies.

nodes.label: Merchant Consortium
nodes.description: A powerful alliance of traders who control the northern trade routes — they value profit over honor.

nodes.label: Shadow Hunters
nodes.description: A brotherhood of monster slayers who have dedicated their lives to purging the shadow corruption.
